steps.title: Use the colon definition
steps.content: The colon introduces a definition of the blank: the Nile River delta is a constantly evolving network whose channels and land strips change in size and shape. The word must mean active or changing.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A means unchanging, which directly contradicts the definition. Choice B implies no equal, but no comparison is made. Choice C concerns long-term maintenance, not constant physical change. The change-focused word fits. The answer is D.
